---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for Flowdesk
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Security impact

Does this affect authentication, authorization, MCP tool access, file upload, logs, secrets, or data exposure?

## Compatibility impact

Does this change existing REST APIs, RAG behavior, MCP preview behavior, configuration, or deployment steps?

## Scope

- Affected module:
- Requires schema/config changes: yes/no
- Requires documentation changes: yes/no

## Security Check

- [ ] This request does not require committing real secrets or private data.
